name: IdsEdwHedisMesrGapDExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte1 AS (SELECT HEDIS_MESR_GAP_SK, HEDIS_MESR_NM, HEDIS_SUB_MESR_NM, HEDIS_MBR_BUCKET_ID, SRC_SYS_CD, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, HEDIS_MESR_SK, HEDIS_MESR_ABBR_ID FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.HEDIS_MESR_GAP) SELECT cte1.HEDIS_MESR_GAP_SK AS HEDIS_MESR_GAP_SK, cte1.HEDIS_MESR_NM AS HEDIS_MESR_NM, cte1.HEDIS_SUB_MESR_NM AS HEDIS_SUB_MESR_NM, cte1.HEDIS_MBR_BUCKET_ID AS HEDIS_MBR_BUCKET_ID, cte1.SRC_SYS_CD AS SRC_SYS_CD, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, cte1.HEDIS_MESR_SK AS HEDIS_MESR_SK, cte1.HEDIS_MESR_ABBR_ID AS HEDIS_MESR_ABBR_ID, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, cte1.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK AS IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM cte1
